faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in East Flatbush?

faqs.question: Why are rats so common in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: East Flatbush's combination of older housing stock, dense population, proximity to subway lines, and active commercial areas creates ideal conditions for rats. Food sources along Church Avenue and Utica Avenue, plus aging building infrastructure, contribute to persistent rat problems in the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to East Flatbush residents. Our team understands that rat infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize emergency calls to protect your health and property as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rat extermination includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, exclusion work to seal access points, removal of dead rodents, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination of the infestation.
